value.found_quote: In Codex on a Mac, use **Settings > Connections > Control other devices** to add the other host. A device can allow remote access and control another device at the same time.
value.rationale: The page describes controlling other connected hosts from a Codex App device, including the "Control other devices" setting on a Mac and the ability to control Windows/other hosts from a Mac. This substantiates the claim.
